name: What should I do first if I want voice search to work for lawyers?
description: Start with real client questions, write short conversational answers, and make sure your site and Google Business Profile are complete and consistent.

mainEntity.name: What should I do first if I want voice search to work for lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Start with the questions people already ask when they call, text, or fill out your contact form. Turn those into short, conversational FAQ answers, then make sure your website, mobile speed, and Google Business Profile support the same message.
acceptedAnswer.description: Start with real client questions, write short conversational answers, and make sure your site and Google Business Profile are complete and consistent.
